description:
Set current or permanent wind vector.
{{Feature | important | The effect is global only if it is executed on the server. Wind set locally will sync back to server value in a while.}}
name: setWind

Item.desc: easterly component (in m/s, positive = to the east)
Item.name: x

Item.desc: northerly component (in m/s, positive = to the north)
Item.name: y

Item.desc: set to [[true]] to lock the wind to constantly blows in set direction
Item.name: forced
